info.name: GateBuddy API - Complete Reference (41 Endpoints)
info.description:
**🔴 AUTHORITATIVE REFERENCE** for GateBuddy - The Intelligent Airport Companion Ecosystem

📚 **API Standards**: JSend + REST conventions

🔗 **Base URLs:**
- **Development**: `http://localhost:3001/api/v1`
- **Production**: `https://gate-buddy-backend-production.up.railway.app/api/v1`

🔐 **Authentication**: Bearer JWT (set automatically after Signup/Login)

⏱️ **Token Details**:
- **Access Token**: Valid for 6 hours
- **Refresh Token**: Valid for 7 days (stored in MongoDB)
- **Method**: Authorization header: `Bearer {token}`

📱 **Core Features:**
1. **JWT Authentication** - 6-hour access, refresh token rotation
2. **OAuth 2.0** - Google, GitHub, Facebook sign-in
3. **Real-Time Flight Tracking** - Delays, gate changes, status updates with audit trail
4. **Indoor Navigation** - Dijkstra pathfinding through airport terminals
5. **AI Chat Assistant** - Google Gemini-powered terminal concierge
6. **Push Notifications** - Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) integration
7. **Ratings & Reviews** - Service ratings with user reviews
8. **Admin Dashboard** - System analytics and management

⚠️ **Important Notes:**
- All timestamps: **ISO 8601 format** (UTC)
- All prices: **USD cents** (divide by 100 for display)
- Rate limiting: **100 requests per 15 minutes** (environment-aware)
- Flight TTL: **Auto-expires 1 hour after scheduled time**
- Flight times shifted: **+6 hours for testing** (real departure = scheduled - 6h)
- Error format: `{ "status": "fail/error", "message": "...", "statusCode": 400 }`

🚀 **Quick Start:**
1. Call `POST /users/signup` to create account
2. Save returned `token` in Bearer Authorization
3. Use `GET /flights` to explore available flights
4. All endpoints with 🔐 require authentication

📖 **Response Format (JSend Standard):**
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": { /* endpoint-specific data */ }
}
```

❌ **Error Format:**
```json
{
  "status": "fail",
  "message": "Descriptive error message",
  "statusCode": 400
}
```

item.name: 🔐 AUTH & PROFILE (15 endpoints)
item.description: User authentication, OAuth, token refresh, and profile management. All responses include JWT token for authenticated endpoints.

item.name: POST /users/signup - Register New User
item.description:
**Register a new user account**

### ✅ What Happens
Creates new user in database. Password is hashed with bcrypt (10 rounds). Email uniqueness enforced with pre-save hook (prevents race conditions). Returns JWT token valid for 6 hours. Sets httpOnly JWT cookie.

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "name": "Sarah Johnson",           // ✓ Required, 3-50 chars
  "email": "sarah@example.com",      // ✓ Required, unique, valid email
  "password": "SecurePass123!",      // ✓ Required, min 8, uppercase, number, special
  "passwordConfirm": "SecurePass123!" // ✓ Required, must match password
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (201 Created)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "name": "Sarah Johnson",
      "email": "sarah.johnson@example.com",
      "role": "user",
      "createdAt": "2026-06-22T14:30:45.123Z"
    },
    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpZCI6IjUwN2YxZjc3YmNmODZjZDc5OTQzOTAxMSIsImlhdCI6MTcxODk5MTg0NSwiZXhwIjoxNzE5MDEzODQ1fQ.7x8y9z0a1b2c3d..."
  }
}
```

### ❌ ERROR RESPONSES
| Status | Message | Cause |
|--------|---------|-------|
| 400 | Passwords don't match | passwordConfirm ≠ password |
| 400 | Password too weak | Missing uppercase, number, or special char |
| 400 | Invalid email | Malformed email format |
| 409 | Email already exists | Duplicate email in database |

### 💾 STORED DATA
- Password hashed with bcrypt (10 rounds)
- Email normalized to lowercase
- Role defaults to "user"
- Created timestamp recorded

item.name: POST /users/login - User Login
item.description:
**Authenticate existing user and get JWT token**

### ✅ What Happens
Validates email/password against stored hash. Returns JWT token (6h validity). Sets httpOnly `jwt` cookie. Account locks after 5 failed attempts (30 min timeout). Pre-checks for null email/password.

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "email": "sarah.johnson@example.com",  // ✓ Required
  "password": "SecurePass123!"            // ✓ Required
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "name": "Sarah Johnson",
      "email": "sarah.johnson@example.com",
      "role": "user"
    },
    "token": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9..."
  }
}
```

### ❌ ERROR RESPONSES
| Status | Message | Cause |
|--------|---------|-------|
| 400 | Please provide email and password | Email or password missing |
| 401 | Email/password incorrect | Invalid credentials |
| 423 | Account locked | 5 failed attempts (30 min timeout) |

### 🔒 Security Features
- Password compared with bcrypt.compare()
- Failed attempts tracked in database
- Account auto-locked after 5 failures
- Lock automatically expires after 30 minutes

item.name: POST /users/logout - User Logout
item.description:
**Logout current user and invalidate session**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### ✅ What Happens
Clears JWT cookie. Client should also clear local token storage.

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success"
}
```

item.name: POST /users/refreshToken - Refresh JWT Token
POST /users/oauth - OAuth Authorization
GET /users/me - Get Current User Profile
item.description:
**Retrieve current authenticated user's full profile**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### ✅ What Happens
Returns complete profile of authenticated user from JWT claim. No database query needed (decoded from token).

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "name": "Sarah Johnson",
      "email": "sarah.johnson@example.com",
      "role": "user",
      "photo": "user-507f1f77bcf86cd799439011.jpeg",
      "createdAt": "2026-06-01T10:00:00.000Z",
      "updatedAt": "2026-06-22T14:30:45.123Z"
    }
  }
}
```

item.name: PATCH /users/updateMe - Update User Profile
item.description:
**Update current user's profile information**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### ✅ What Happens
Updates name, photo, or other profile fields. Cannot change email/password here (use dedicated endpoints). Updates `updatedAt` timestamp.

### 📝 REQUEST BODY (all fields optional)
```json
{
  "name": "Sarah J. Johnson",    // Max 50 chars
  "photo": "user-photo-2024.jpg"  // Stored in /public/img/users/
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "name": "Sarah J. Johnson",
      "email": "sarah.johnson@example.com",
      "photo": "user-photo-2024.jpg",
      "updatedAt": "2026-06-22T14:35:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

item.name: PATCH /users/updatePassword - Change Password
DELETE /users/deleteMe - Delete Account
item.description:
**Permanently delete user account**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### ⚠️ WARNING
**This action is IRREVERSIBLE.** Account and ALL associated data will be deleted.

### ✅ What Happens
Deletes user document from database. All related data (flights, notifications, ratings) removed.

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (204 No Content)
No response body returned

item.name: GET /users/:id - Get User by ID (Admin)
item.description:
**Get specific user profile (Admin only)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### 📝 URL Parameters
```
:id = MongoDB user ID (24-character hex string)
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "name": "Sarah Johnson",
      "email": "sarah.johnson@example.com",
      "role": "user"
    }
  }
}
```

item.name: GET /users - Get All Users (Admin)
item.description:
**Get paginated list of all users (Admin only)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
limit     = Results per page (default: 10, max: 100)
page      = Page number (1-indexed, default: 1)
sort      = Sort field (prefix '-' for descending, default: -createdAt)
fields    = Comma-separated field names to return
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 3,
    "users": [
      {
        "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
        "name": "Sarah Johnson",
        "email": "sarah@example.com",
        "role": "user",
        "createdAt": "2026-06-01T10:00:00.000Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: PATCH /users/:id - Update User (Admin)
DELETE /users/:id - Delete User (Admin)
item.description:
**Delete user account (Admin only)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### ⚠️ WARNING
Deletes target user permanently.

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (204 No Content)
No response body

item.name: POST /users/createUser - Create User (Admin)
item.description:
**Create new user account (Admin only)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### ✅ What Happens
Admins can create user accounts directly without signup form. Password validated and hashed with bcrypt.

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "name": "New Admin User",            // ✓ Required
  "email": "newadmin@example.com",     // ✓ Required, unique
  "password": "AdminPass123!",         // ✓ Required, min 8, uppercase, number, special
  "passwordConfirm": "AdminPass123!", // ✓ Required, must match
  "role": "admin"                      // ✗ Optional, default: "user"
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (201 Created)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "user": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439015",
      "name": "New Admin User",
      "email": "newadmin@example.com",
      "role": "admin"
    }
  }
}
```

### ❌ ERROR RESPONSES
- **400 Bad Request**: Validation error (duplicate email, weak password, etc.)

item.name: ✈️ FLIGHTS (10 endpoints)
item.description: Flight management, real-time tracking, delays, gate changes, boarding updates, and audit trail

item.name: GET /flights - Get All Flights
item.description:
**Get paginated list of all flights**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
limit        = Results per page (default: 20)
page         = Page number (1-indexed)
departure    = Filter by departure airport IATA code (JFK, LAX, ORD, etc.)
arrival      = Filter by arrival airport IATA code
airline      = Filter by airline code (UA, AA, SW)
status       = Filter: scheduled|boarding|delayed|departed|cancelled
sort         = Sort field (default: -scheduledDeparture)
fields       = Comma-separated field names
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 45,
    "flights": [
      {
        "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439001",
        "flightNumber": "UA123",
        "airline": "United Airlines",
        "departure": "JFK",
        "arrival": "LAX",
        "gate": "B42",
        "scheduledDeparture": "2026-06-22T20:30:00.000Z",
        "actualDeparture": null,
        "status": "boarding",
        "delay": 5,
        "aircraft": "Boeing 777"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: POST /flights - Create Flight (Admin)
item.description:
**Create new flight entry**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "flightNumber": "UA456",                    // ✓ Required, e.g. UA456
  "airline": "United Airlines",               // ✓ Required
  "departure": "JFK",                        // ✓ Required, IATA code
  "arrival": "SFO",                          // ✓ Required, IATA code
  "scheduledDeparture": "2026-06-22T22:00:00.000Z", // ✓ Required, ISO datetime
  "gate": "C15",                             // ✗ Optional
  "aircraft": "Boeing 787",                  // ✗ Optional
  "status": "scheduled"                      // ✗ Optional, default: scheduled
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (201 Created)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "flight": {
      "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439050",
      "flightNumber": "UA456",
      "airline": "United Airlines",
      "gate": "C15",
      "status": "scheduled",
      "delay": 0
    }
  }
}
```

item.name: GET /flights/search - Search Flights
item.description:
**Search for flights by route and date**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
departure  = ✓ IATA code (JFK, LAX, ORD, etc.)
arrival    = ✓ IATA code
date       = ✓ Date in YYYY-MM-DD format
sortBy     = Sort by "time" or "delay" (default: time)
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 5,
    "flights": [
      {
        "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439001",
        "flightNumber": "UA123",
        "departure": "JFK",
        "arrival": "LAX",
        "scheduledDeparture": "2026-06-22T14:30:00.000Z",
        "gate": "B42",
        "delay": 15
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: POST /flights/filter - Filter Flights
PATCH /flights/:id - Update Flight (Admin)
item.description:
**Update flight information (gate, delay, status)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### ✅ What Happens
Updates flight gate, status, or delay. **AUTOMATICALLY RECORDS CHANGES TO FLIGHTUPDATE COLLECTION** for audit trail with before/after values and timestamps.

### 📝 REQUEST BODY (all optional)
```json
{
  "gate": "B50",                                    // New gate number
  "delay": 20,                                      // Delay in minutes
  "status": "delayed",                              // Status value
  "actualDeparture": "2026-06-22T14:50:00.000Z"   // Actual departure time
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "flight": {
      "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439001",
      "flightNumber": "UA123",
      "gate": "B50",
      "delay": 20,
      "status": "delayed"
    }
  }
}
```

### 💾 AUDIT TRAIL SIDE EFFECT
Automatic FlightUpdate record created:
```json
{
  "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439100",
  "flight": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439001",
  "updateType": "gate_change",
  "before": "B42",
  "after": "B50",
  "timestamp": "2026-06-22T15:00:00.000Z"
}
```

item.name: DELETE /flights/:id - Delete Flight (Admin)
item.description:
**Delete flight (Admin only)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (204 No Content)
No response body

item.name: POST /flights/:id/track - Track Flight
GET /flights/:id/updates - Get Flight Updates (Audit Trail)
item.description:
**Get recent updates for a flight (delays, gate changes, status changes)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### ✅ What Happens
Returns all FlightUpdate records for this flight sorted by timestamp (newest first). Tracks ALL changes: delays, gate changes, status changes, boarding times.

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
limit  = Number of updates to return (default: 30)
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 5,
    "updates": [
      {
        "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439100",
        "flight": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439001",
        "updateType": "gate_change",
        "before": "B40",
        "after": "B42",
        "timestamp": "2026-06-22T14:15:00.000Z"
      },
      {
        "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439101",
        "flight": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439001",
        "updateType": "delay",
        "before": 0,
        "after": 5,
        "timestamp": "2026-06-22T14:25:00.000Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: POST /flights/scanBoardingPass - Scan Boarding Pass
item.description:
**Scan and validate boarding pass (IATA 792 standard)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### ✅ What Happens
Validates boarding pass using IATA 792 barcode format. Extracts flight info, validates date/time, returns flight status and gate information. Returns error if pass is invalid or expired.

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "boardingPassData": "M1UA123ABC456789123456789012345" // ✓ Required, IATA 792 format
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "valid": true,
    "flight": {
      "flightNumber": "UA123",
      "departure": "JFK",
      "arrival": "LAX",
      "scheduledDeparture": "2026-06-22T14:30:00.000Z",
      "gate": "B42",
      "status": "boarding",
      "delay": 5
    },
    "passenger": "JOHN DOE",
    "seat": "12A",
    "boardingGroup": "1"
  }
}
```

### ❌ ERROR RESPONSES
- **400 Bad Request**: Invalid barcode format
- **401 Unauthorized**: Boarding pass expired

item.name: 🏢 SERVICES (8 endpoints)
item.description: Airport services (lounges, restaurants, stores), ratings, and user reviews

item.name: GET /services - Get All Services
item.description:
**Get paginated list of airport services (restaurants, lounges, stores)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
airport    = Filter by airport IATA code (JFK, LAX, ORD)
type       = Service type: restaurant|lounge|store|bar|other
minRating  = Minimum average rating (1-5)
limit      = Results per page (default: 20)
page       = Page number (default: 1)
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 42,
    "services": [
      {
        "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439020",
        "name": "The Smith Restaurant",
        "type": "restaurant",
        "airport": "JFK",
        "terminal": "4",
        "gate": "B40-B50",
        "description": "Upscale American restaurant",
        "cuisine": "American",
        "priceLevel": 3,
        "averageRating": 4.5,
        "totalReviews": 128,
        "hours": "6:00 AM - 11:00 PM",
        "coordinates": {
          "type": "Point",
          "coordinates": [-73.7781, 40.6413]
        }
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: POST /services/search - Search Services
item.description:
**Search services by name, cuisine, or type**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "query": "sushi",           // ✓ Required, search term
  "airport": "JFK",           // ✗ Optional, IATA code
  "type": "restaurant"        // ✗ Optional, service type
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 7,
    "services": []
  }
}
```

item.name: POST /services/filter - Filter Services
item.description:
**Apply complex filters to services**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "filters": {
    "type": "restaurant",
    "minRating": 4.0,
    "priceLevel": [1, 2],
    "airport": "JFK",
    "cuisine": ["Italian", "Asian Fusion"],
    "hasWifi": true,
    "hasUSB": true
  }
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 15,
    "services": []
  }
}
```

item.name: POST /services - Create Service (Admin)
item.description:
**Create new airport service (Admin only)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "name": "New Lounge",           // ✓ Required
  "type": "lounge",              // ✓ Required: restaurant|lounge|store|bar
  "airport": "JFK",              // ✓ Required, IATA code
  "terminal": "4",               // ✗ Optional
  "description": "...",           // ✗ Optional
  "priceLevel": 4,               // ✗ Optional, 1-5
  "hours": "5:00 AM - 12:00 AM" // ✗ Optional
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (201 Created)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "service": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439030",
      "name": "New Lounge",
      "type": "lounge",
      "airport": "JFK"
    }
  }
}
```

item.name: PATCH /services/:id - Update Service (Admin)
DELETE /services/:id - Delete Service (Admin)
item.description:
**Delete service listing (Admin only)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (204 No Content)
No response body

item.name: POST /services/:id/rate - Rate Service
GET /services/:id - Get Service Details
item.description:
**Get detailed information about a specific service**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
includeReviews = Include recent reviews (boolean, default: false)
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "service": {
      "_id": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439020",
      "name": "The Smith Restaurant",
      "type": "restaurant",
      "airport": "JFK",
      "averageRating": 4.6,
      "totalReviews": 129,
      "reviews": [
        {
          "rating": 5,
          "review": "Excellent food and service!",
          "userName": "Sarah J.",
          "createdAt": "2026-06-22T15:30:00.000Z"
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

item.name: 🔔 NOTIFICATIONS (3 endpoints)
item.description: Notification management and delivery via Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)

item.name: GET /notifications - Get User Notifications
item.description:
**Get user's notifications (flight updates, service alerts, messages)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
limit      = Results per page (default: 50)
page       = Page number (default: 1)
unreadOnly = Show only unread (boolean, default: false)
type       = Filter: flight_update|service_alert|chat_message|general
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 8,
    "notifications": [
      {
        "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439300",
        "user": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
        "type": "flight_update",
        "title": "Flight UA123 Gate Change",
        "message": "Your flight UA123 gate has changed from B40 to B42",
        "read": false,
        "relatedFlight": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439001",
        "createdAt": "2026-06-22T14:15:00.000Z"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

item.name: POST /notifications - Create Notification (Admin)

body.raw:
{
  "userId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
  "type": "service_alert",
  "title": "New Restaurant Opening",
  "message": "A new sushi restaurant has opened in Terminal 4",
  "relatedService": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439030"
}

item.description:
**Send notification to user (Admin only)**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "userId": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",            // ✓ Required
  "type": "service_alert",                        // ✓ Required
  "title": "New Restaurant Opening",              // ✓ Required
  "message": "A new sushi restaurant...",        // ✓ Required
  "relatedService": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439030"   // ✗ Optional
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (201 Created)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "notification": {
      "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439301",
      "user": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "type": "service_alert",
      "title": "New Restaurant Opening",
      "message": "A new sushi restaurant has opened in Terminal 4",
      "read": false,
      "createdAt": "2026-06-22T15:35:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

GET /stats/analytics - Detailed Analytics
item.description:
**Get detailed analytics for airport or service**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token + Admin role

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
airport = IATA code for airport-specific analytics
period  = day|week|month|year
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "analytics": {
      "airport": "JFK",
      "period": "month",
      "topFlights": ["UA123", "AA456"],
      "topServices": ["The Smith Restaurant", "Sky Lounge"],
      "averageDelay": 12.5,
      "delayedFlights": 156,
      "onTimeFlights": 428
    }
  }
}
```

📱 DEVICES (2 endpoints)
item.description: Device registration for push notifications (Firebase Cloud Messaging)

item.name: POST /devices/register - Register Device
item.description:
**Register device for push notifications**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
Bearer token

### ✅ What Happens
Registers mobile device with Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) token. Enables receiving push notifications for flight updates, alerts, and messages.

### 📝 REQUEST BODY
```json
{
  "fcmToken": "cWFoOmh1e...",         // ✓ Required, FCM token from mobile app
  "deviceType": "ios",               // ✓ Required: ios|android|web
  "deviceName": "Sarah's iPhone",    // ✗ Optional, user-friendly name
  "osVersion": "17.5"                // ✗ Optional, OS version
}
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (201 Created)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "device": {
      "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439400",
      "user": "507f1f77bcf86cd799439011",
      "fcmToken": "cWFoOmh1eDpzOmFoczAzOjAzNzQ4NDEyNzMzOTEyODMzMzQ0NTMyODk3Mzg5NzQ3Ng==",
      "deviceType": "ios",
      "deviceName": "Sarah's iPhone",
      "registeredAt": "2026-06-22T15:45:00.000Z",
      "lastActive": "2026-06-22T15:45:00.000Z"
    }
  }
}
```

❓ FAQ (2 endpoints)
item.description: Frequently asked questions about the app and airports

item.name: GET /faqs - Get All FAQs
item.description:
**Get list of frequently asked questions**

### 🔐 Authentication Required
None (public endpoint)

### 📝 QUERY PARAMETERS
```
category = Filter: flights|navigation|services|account
limit    = Results per page (default: 20)
page     = Page number (default: 1)
```

### 📤 SUCCESS RESPONSE (200 OK)
```json
{
  "status": "success",
  "data": {
    "results": 8,
    "faqs": [
      {
        "_id": "607f1f77bcf86cd799439500",
        "question": "How can I track my flight in real-time?",
        "answer": "You can search for your flight using your flight number or route. Tap the flight to view real-time status including delays, gate changes, and boarding updates.",
        "category": "flights",
        "order": 1
      }
    ]
  }
}
```
